archimate:DataObject.name: Exchange Item metadata
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: Exchange Item Metadata refers to the structured information that provides descriptive and contextual details about an exchange item in a data exchange or integration process. It includes attributes such as the item's name, description, format, source, destination, and any additional metadata that helps define its characteristics and usage. Exchange Item Metadata serves as a standardized representation of the item's properties, enabling effective data integration, interoperability, and understanding across different systems and applications.
Source: W3C
Source reference: https://www.w3.org/standards/
LOST view: SV-Business Agnostic Metadata
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ExchangeItemMetadataDataObject
ABB name: egovera:ExchangeItemMetadataDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ExchangeItemMetadataDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetDataObject

properties.value: Exchange Item Metadata refers to the structured information that provides descriptive and contextual details about an exchange item in a data exchange or integration process. It includes attributes such as the item's name, description, format, source, destination, and any additional metadata that helps define its characteristics and usage. Exchange Item Metadata serves as a standardized representation of the item's properties, enabling effective data integration, interoperability, and understanding across different systems and applications.
